articles.title: FIFA lifts US star striker Balogun’s red card suspension at World Cup after Trump calls Infantino - AP News
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump intervened on behalf of American star forward Folarin Balogun, whose suspension was lifted in a decision that allows him to play in a World Cup match against Belgium on Monday. Balogun, the American leader with three goals, receive…

articles.author: Jeremy Roebuck, Cat Zakrzewski, Olivia George
articles.title: Trump says he overruled plan to cancel Mall celebration amid weather evacuations - The Washington Post
articles.description: The chaotic scramble to seek shelter at the “Salute to America” event on July Fourth raised questions about whether officials had adequately prepared for severe heat and threatening storms.
articles.content: President Donald Trump said Sunday he personally overruled a recommendation to cancel the July Fourth Salute to America event on the National Mall after approaching storms forced a chaotic evacuation… [+103 chars]

articles.author: Jason Ma
articles.title: The stock market is about to suffer a ‘snapback’ and will lose much of this year’s gains as ‘speculation is hitting extreme levels,’ BofA warns - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: Bank of America reaffirmed its year-end price target of 7,100 for the S&P 500, representing a 5% drop from the week's closing level.
articles.content:
The S&P 500 just notched its best quarter since 2020 and is up about 9% so far this year, but it's mostly downhill from here, according to Bank of America.
